adapTrunc

Using class separability as a proxy to find optimal truncation depth in BERT-style models.

PythonPyTorchNLPML
★ 0 GitHub Paper

Overview

adapTrunc explores whether we can use class separability as a proxy to find the optimal truncation depth in BERT-style models — the goal being faster inference without fine-tuning every layer.

Key Results

  • CSM correlates strongly with fine-tuned accuracy on spam detection
  • 40% speedup at only 2% accuracy loss when truncating at layer 14

Related Writing

  • TCP Handshake Deep Dive — networking fundamentals that informed the distributed evaluation pipeline
